one_line: Wrote a 929-word validated Conclusion framing the agent as earning autonomy via graduated, mechanism-aware, revocable evaluation (graduation not deployment); grounded in 4 repo mechanisms (trust tiers, uncrammable reward, curriculum, 0.86=solve-4+escalate-1 ceiling) with 9 provenance-pinned claims + stdlib validator (T1 pass, T2/T3 negative controls fail); no core files edited
